filename: The Ossuary of Lost Tongues (Arcane Mystery) - 2026-03-04.txt
title: The Ossuary of Lost Tongues
excerpt: The air in the Grand Archives of Eldoria clung to Kaelen like a shroud woven from dust and forgotten parchment. It was a familiar embrace, though, one he’d welcomed for the better part of a decade. Tonight, the only sound was the scratching of his quill and the distant, rhythmic clang of the City…
